Rule: no dynamics, physics, stochasticity, geometry, arithmetic, operator algebra, environment, or unitarity as ontic primitive beyond subsystem-being
Scope: global CNNA ontology, object register, phase DAG, scratchpads, proof dossiers, consumer bridges, external-comparison sections
Enforcement: Every such structure must cite a derived cut/regime/complement/Schur-DtN/source-object chain. If a phase needs one of these before the chain exists, it must backjump to the natural generating layer rather than postulate or patch the consumer.

Rule: no string-like or physical analogy as CNNA-generative input
Scope: All interpretive, arithmetic, Schur/DtN, and handoff phases.
Enforcement: Analogies may be comparison/diagnostic notes only; any formula, object, spectrum, or handoff must have a derived code/proof route.

Rule: no horizontal/vertical Schur-duality or string/subsystem analogy as input to earlier generators, Schur, arithmetic, or CD definitions
Scope: all Pillar-A bridge, Schur, arithmetic, CD, and generator phases
Enforcement: the duality may only be a later theorem/diagnostic target after S05/O05/TM0/CD7/BR06/BR07 are closed; earlier phases may export data to it but never consume its conclusion
